
### typical TLS handshake 



::: {.r-stack .my-full}
![](/secure/texfig/tls-handshake-summary.figure-1.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=1}

![](/secure/texfig/tls-handshake-summary.figure-2.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=2}

![](/secure/texfig/tls-handshake-summary.figure-3.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=3}

![](/secure/texfig/tls-handshake-summary.figure-4.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=4}

![](/secure/texfig/tls-handshake-summary.figure-5.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=5}

![](/secure/texfig/tls-handshake-summary.figure-6.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=6}


:::
